title: Date Stone Delight Wrap
description: A savory and crispy weeknight middle-eastern dish featuring stoned dates wrapped in a pita bread for a pescatarian-friendly snack.
instructions: Toast the stone dates by placing them in a small skillet and drizzling with olive oil. Toast for about 2-3 minutes or until lightly golden.
While the dates are toasting, place one slice of pita bread on a flat surface. Brush it lightly with olive oil and sprinkle with salt.
Carefully cut each toasted date in half to reveal the center stone core (if you prefer smaller pieces, do this before the toast step).
Gently press one date piece into the center of each pita slice, filling them up as much as possible without breaking the pita bread.
Place the filled pitas on a baking sheet and bake in the preheated oven for 10-12 minutes or until the pits are crispy and golden brown.
Serve hot with additional olive oil and lemon juice for drizzling if desired.
